Most agent "design skills" are just a giant prompt that says "you are a senior designer"

Cool...

That tells the AI nothing about actual design systems, token architecture, or accessibility standards

So I built a skill pack that gives Claude real UX/UI knowledge - not vibes,

If your AI agent can't learn or remember, it's not an agent.

It's a useless bot.

If your Claude Projects don't have Skills, they aren't Projects.

They're just chats with some context.

If your Skills can't one-shot anything they aren't Skills.

They're just an extra prompt.
起業に興味ある人がClaude Codeで最短で成果を出す方法。①CLAUDE.mdに自分の強み・世界観を定義②Agent SDKで集客と販売のAIを構築③寝てる間にAIが稼働。発想力さえあれば実行力はAIが補う。
